responses.name: Check-In Time
responses.text: Check-in is at 3:30 PM. We ask that you respect this time frame which allows our cleaners to have the house ready for you. Let us know if you have any other questions.

responses.name: Post Check-Out - Thank You
responses.text:
Thank you for staying with us! Have a safe rest of your journey. Let me know if anything was needed or what we can do to improve on our home. We aim to provide the best guest experiences. If you would like to stay with us again you can find our listing here: https://www.xxxxx.com

It was nice to meet you, we wish you can stay with us again soon!
